title: Workdays with holidays and costumized workweek

posts.author: Mocca93 (Stijn De Blende)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

For the planning of project i would like to know the start and end date of a certain task.
So i added the colum ‘timeline+numeriek’ to set the amount of days and see where thats get me.

The problem is that is doesnt seem to keep the holidays in mind and also from monday till friday.

So i tried to define a new work shedule from monday-Saturday including holidays.
I asigned it to a team.
When I try to calculate the end date, it still doesn’t take saterday as a workday and exclude holidays from it.

Can someone tell me what I’m doing wrong?

Scherm­afbeelding 2024-03-04 om 21.43.261280×684 132 KB

Scherm­afbeelding 2024-03-04 om 21.45.491280×694 146 KB

Scherm­afbeelding 2024-03-04 om 21.46.191280×678 155 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

I am afraid this is expected at this time as this feature only applies to the workload view. It isn’t currently possible to have the work schedule applied to the timeline column at this time - I apologise for the setback

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT is there any timeline for incorporating holidays into the workday formula? This is hampering our adoption, as using workdays to count when deliverables are due and overdue penalizes people when there is a holiday in the period.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. Yesterday we launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. With is you can all types of off days you’d need and as many as you need. It really helps understanding team members workloads and planning projects better.

I wonder if this is still relevant for you, but here it is-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
